goal: Robo-factory: 4 parallel Franka pick-and-place cells in a single scene, each independently picking cubes from its own conveyor and placing them in its own bin. Demonstrates per-robot subscription scoping (_curobo_pp_sub_<TAG> per Franka prim path) and that multiple cuRobo controllers coexist without interference. Reverse-engineered from /standalone_examples/.../robo_factory/robo_factory.py (which uses StackingController × 4 with offset cloning).
thoughts:
Six specifics for CP-07 (4-Franka parallel factory):
1) Each robot at world Y offset (i*2 - 3) for i in [0..3] → Y = -3, -1, 1, 3. 2m spacing avoids cross-robot collision under cuRobo planning.
2) Each Franka has its own conveyor (Conv_i) + bin (Bin_i) + sensor (Sensor_i) + 4 cubes (Cube_i_j). Total: 4 conveyors, 4 bins, 4 sensors, 16 cubes.
3) Each setup_pick_place_controller install creates _curobo_pp_sub__World_Franka<i> — distinct subscription per robot. Verified by stress_dual_robot.py that multi-robot scoping works without cross-install interference.
4) Controller install order: build all geometry first (Franka<0..3>, Conv<0..3>, Bin<0..3>, Cube<0..3>_<0..3>, Sensor<0..3>), THEN install controllers in parallel.
5) Long table spans all 4 stations: 2.5x9x0.75m so each Franka has 2x1m of footprint.
6) Same physics setup as CP-01: CPU dynamics, sleepThreshold=0, rubber on cubes only, DomeLight=1000.
code:
# DomeLight + ground
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Wide table spanning 4 stations (each station ~2x1m at Y=-3,-1,1,3)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 4.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# CPU dynamics required for PhysxSurfaceVelocityAPI
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# 4 parallel Franka stations at Y = -3, -1, 1, 3
for i in range(4):
    y_offset = (i * 2) - 3
    robot_wizard(
        robot_name="franka_panda",
        dest_path=f"/World/Franka{i}",
        position=[0, y_offset, 0.75],
        orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
    )
    create_conveyor(
        prim_path=f"/World/Conv{i}",
        position=[0.0, y_offset + 0.4, 0.78],
        size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
        surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
    )
    for j, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
        path = f"/World/Cube_{i}_{j+1}"
        create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, y_offset + 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
        for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
            apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    bulk_set_attribute(
        prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i}_{j+1}" for j in range(4)],
        attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
        value=0.0,
    )
    for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i}_{j+1}" for j in range(4)]:
        apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")
    create_bin(
        prim_path=f"/World/Bin{i}",
        position=[0, y_offset - 0.4, 0.75],
        size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15],
    )
    add_proximity_sensor(
        sensor_path=f"/World/Sensor{i}",
        position=[0.4, y_offset + 0.4, 0.835],
        size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06],
    )

# Install 4 cuRobo controllers — each scoped per robot tag
for i in range(4):
    setup_pick_place_controller(
        robot_path=f"/World/Franka{i}",
        target_source="curobo",
        sensor_path=f"/World/Sensor{i}",
        belt_path=f"/World/Conv{i}",
        source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i}_{j+1}" for j in range(4)],
        destination_path=f"/World/Bin{i}",
        planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", f"/World/Conv{i}", f"/World/Bin{i}"],
    )
failure_modes: Robot offsets too close (<2m apart) → cross-robot collision under cuRobo planning. Use Y = -3, -1, 1, 3 (2m spacing).
Single shared table too narrow → robots fall off. Table scale=[1.0, 4.5, 0.375] gives 9m total Y extent.
Installing controllers BEFORE all geometry exists → some controllers can't find their cubes/bins. Build all geometry first, then install controllers.
Same physics gotchas as CP-01: GPU dynamics disabled, sleepThreshold=0, rubber on cubes.
extension_notes: CP-07 stress-tests multi-robot scoping infrastructure. Each cuRobo install creates _curobo_pp_sub_<robot_tag>; cleanup logic must not kill other robots' subs (verified in commit 755effb stale-sub-cleanup). Future variants: 8× parallel for IsaacLab GPU-batched training; mixed robot families (2× Franka + 2× UR10) for fleet-coexistence test. Form-gate verifies stage 0 only — other 3 stations replicate the same pattern but verify_pickplace_pipeline treats stages as relay (place_i→pick_{i+1}); independent-station verification mode is a future verifier extension.
delivery: All 16 cubes (4 per Franka × 4) delivered to their respective bins
